commit.message:
Added new test-am-utils.sh and other regression testing updates (#2364)

* Resolved all dependencies for Arch and Debian Jessie containers.

* Added four new test related functions:
- Function to hide libfuse.so.2: _hide_libfuse2()
- Function to restore libfuse.so.2: _restore_libfuse2()
- Function to hide a list binaries: _hide_binaries()
- Function to restore a list binaries: _restore_binaries()

* Improved nolibfuse test to hide lifuse.so.2 if it exists.

* Added new dependency test to rely on am-utils as fallback: test-am-utils.sh

* Improved keypress printf readability + cleanups.

* Moved restore/hide core binary list to test-common.sh.

* Added test_apps() function and improved hide/restore_binaries().

* Used test_apps() in all tests where appropriate, after am -i is called

* Update test-am-utils.sh

* Update test-am-regress.sh

commit.message:
"AM" 10.2 - made "wget" a non-core dependency (#2353)

* Alternate curl and wget to check domains

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Toggle between curl and wget to read online text

* Toggle between curl and wget to read online text

* Alternate curl and wget to download items

* Add wget command condition for "Fedora mess"

* Change wget v1 detection model

* If wget is not v1, use curl

* Add GNU "mv" as dependency (for freeBSD)

* Mase wget an optional dependency

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Consider wget as a "plus", no more a dependency

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Simplify the way progress bars are added

* wget is no more "core", but recommended

* Option downgrade, fix am-utils and wget as argument

* Converting `wget url -O file` refs for curl usage (when needed)

* Update README.md

* Patch the AM-updater in case wget is needed but missing

* Determine space before checksum function (wget/curl)

* Add hidden lines to improve next time, for checksum

ref https://github.com/ivan-hc/AM/issues/2360

* Update APP-MANAGER
